# Sofia Martin
Regulatory Affairs Specialist | Medical Devices | Lyon
Email: sofia.martin@example.test | Phone: +33 4 00 00 00 00 | LinkedIn: example.test/sofia

## Summary
Regulatory affairs specialist with three years of experience supporting medical-device compliance, technical documentation and post-market activities. Combines precise regulatory analysis with practical coordination across quality, clinical and engineering teams.

## Experience
### MedNova Devices - Regulatory Affairs Associate | 2023 - 2026
- Prepared and maintained EU MDR technical documentation for Class II medical devices, including change-impact assessments and submission readiness reviews.
- Coordinated evidence collection with quality, clinical and engineering teams and tracked responses to notified-body questions through closure.
- Supported post-market surveillance, vigilance reporting and updates to risk-management and clinical-evaluation documentation.

### BioCert Laboratories - Quality Assurance Intern | 2022 - 2023
- Reviewed controlled documents, training records and CAPA evidence against ISO 13485 procedures before internal audits.
- Consolidated audit findings, owners and due dates and prepared traceable follow-up packs for quality-management reviews.

## Skills
Regulatory Affairs: EU MDR, technical documentation, regulatory submissions, change control
Quality Systems: ISO 13485, CAPA, internal audits, document control
Clinical & Safety: clinical evaluation, post-market surveillance, vigilance, risk management
Delivery: cross-functional coordination, gap analysis, technical writing, stakeholder communication

## Education
### University of Lyon - MSc Biomedical Engineering and Regulatory Affairs | 2021 - 2023
- Medical-device regulation, quality systems, clinical evaluation and biostatistics.

### University of Grenoble - BSc Life Sciences | 2018 - 2021
- Cell biology, physiology, scientific writing and experimental design.
